article.title: 3D printing enthusiast smashes 59-second 3DBenchy for new speed world record —Minuteman 3D printer with revamped bed motion system breaches minute mark
article.summary: A 3D printing enthusiast broke the 3DBenchy speed record with a cute little boat model printed in 59 seconds.
article.title_zh: 3D 列印愛好者以 59 秒打破 3DBenchy 速度世界紀錄 — Minuteman 3D 列印機採用改良式床面運動系統突破 1 分鐘大關
article.summary_zh: 一位 3D 列印愛好者用可愛的小船模型在 59 秒內列印完成，打破 3DBenchy 速度紀錄。

article.title: Huawei touts chip design breakthrough as answer to US sanctions
article.summary: China's Huawei is feeling chipper about a new way of designing semiconductors that could free it from the constraints imposed by US restrictions.
article.title_zh: 華為宣傳晶片設計突破作為應對美國制裁的解決方案
article.summary_zh: 中國華為對於一種新的半導體設計方法感到樂觀，該方法可能使其擺脫美國限制帶來的束縛。

article.title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
article.summary: Huawei says it's come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader TSMC, potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment. Bloomberg Intelligence's Robert Lea explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 華為宣傳晶片突破以縮小與 TSMC 的差距
article.summary_zh: 華為聲稱已找到新途徑縮小與業界領導者 TSMC 的差距，有望在無需尖端設備的情況下實現先進半導體製造的突破。

article.title: Volvo Car Avoids US Ban on Connected Vehicles Tied to China
article.summary: The Trump administration reached an agreement with Volvo Car AB that will allow the automaker to avoid a US ban on connected vehicles tied to China.
article.title_zh: Volvo Car 避免美國禁止與中國相關的聯網車輛
article.summary_zh: 特朗普政府與 Volvo Car 達成協議，允許該汽車製造商避免美國禁止與中國相關的聯網車輛。

article.title: Microsoft's GitHub bans security researcher who posted zero-day Windows exploits because company 'ruined their life'  — expert claims action is vindictive and promises further retaliation
article.summary: Microsoft's GitHub bans security researcher who posted zero-day Windows exploits
article.title_zh: Microsoft的GitHub禁止發布Windows零日漏洞的安全研究人員，理由是公司「毀了他們的生活」——專家聲稱該行動是報復性的並承諾進一步報復
article.summary_zh: Microsoft的GitHub禁止發布Windows零日漏洞的安全研究人員。

article.title: Volvo gets US government approval to bypass Chinese connected-car ban
article.summary: Volvo Cars got some welcome news from the US Department of Commerce yesterday. The government has told the Swedish automaker, which is partly owned by China's Zhejiang Geely Holding, that it may import connected cars into the US, despite a ban on such vehicle software with Chinese links from model year 2027 onward. Protectionism is nothing new to the US automotive segment; the absence of foreign-built pickup trucks on US roads is still a consequence of 1964's "chicken tax," for example. More recently, in a rare example of bipartisanship, the focus has been on keeping China out. In 2024, then-President Biden first levied a 100 percent tariff on Chinese imports, followed by a new Commerce rule that prohibited imports of any connected vehicles built by companies owned by or with links to Chin
article.title_zh: 沃爾沃獲美國政府批准繞過中國互聯網汽車禁令
article.summary_zh: 美國商務部批准瑞典汽車製造商沃爾沃（部分由中國浙江吉利控股）進口互聯網連接汽車到美國，儘管存在禁止中國相關軟體的禁令。

article.title: An Agent-Driven End-to-End HW-SW Co-Design Benchmark for Heterogeneous SoCs (Columbia, IBM)
article.summary: Researchers from Columbia University and IBM Research have released “HSCO-Bench: An Agent-Driven End-to-End Hardware-Software Co-design Benchmark for Systems-on-Chip”. Abstract “Large language models (LLMs) are adopted for software and hardware design, yet these domains are still evaluated separately. Software benchmarks typically assume fixed hardware targets, while hardware benchmarks focus on component-level optimization without considering the full hardware-software stack. Consequently, no existing benchmark evaluates whether an LLM agent can perform end-to-end, system-level hardware-software co-design. Such a process requires: 1) analyzing applications to identify kernels requiring acceleration, 2) designing and integrating heterogeneous accelerators into a System-on-Chip (SoC) under
article.title_zh: 異構SoC的智能體驅動端到端硬體軟體協設計基準測試（哥倫比亞大學、IBM）
article.summary_zh: 來自哥倫比亞大學和IBM研究院的研究人員發布了「HSCO-Bench: 用於片上系統的智能體驅動端到端硬體軟體協設計基準測試」。

article.title: How the AC/DC framework helps teams govern AI coding agents
article.summary: Much of the conversation around AI coding is still centered on how fast machines can produce code. But code volume is not the same thing as software progress. As teams rely on agents for larger units of work, the harder question is whether they can build a repeatable system to steer, check, and correct machine-produced code before it creates downstream risk. One useful way to think about that system is through the Agent Centric Development Cycle (AC/DC) framework. At its core, AC/DC defines four stages that govern how agentic development actually works at scale : Guide, Generate, Verify, Solve. Of those stages, Generate, the act of AI agents producing code, gets most of the market attention. But in practice, the framework stands or falls on the strength of the layers around it. If Guide is
article.title_zh: AC/DC 框架如何幫助團隊治理 AI 編碼代理
article.summary_zh: 關於 AI 編程的討論多聚焦於機器生成代碼的速度，但代碼量並不等於軟體進度。當團隊依賴代理處理更大規模工作時，更難的問題是能否建立可重複的系統來控制、檢查和修正代碼。

article.title: Samsung $400,000 worker bonuses near approval after clearing legal challenge — non-chip employees in line for just $4,000 launch last-minute bid to scupper deal with union
article.summary: The Suwon District Court rejected the injunction filed by five employees from Samsung’s Device eXperience division.
article.title_zh: 三星 40 萬美元員工獎金接近獲准（克服法律挑戰）— 非晶片員工最多獲 4,000 美元，工會最後關頭阻止協議
article.summary_zh: 水原地方法院駁回了來自三星 Device eXperience 部門五名員工提出的禁制令申請。

article.title: Logistics Firm Stord Nabs $250 Million to Help Brands Take On Amazon
article.summary: Stord Inc., a logistics technology startup, raised $250 million in a new funding round to expand its fulfillment operation and help merchants better compete with Amazon.com Inc.
article.title_zh: 物流公司 Stord 籌資 2.5 億美元幫助品牌對抗亞馬遜
article.summary_zh: 物流科技新創公司 Stord Inc. 籌資 2.5 億美元，用於擴展其履行業務，幫助商家更好地與 Amazon.com Inc. 競爭。

article.title: 透過微軟Teams散布惡意程式的攻擊又一樁！駭客假冒IT支援發動ModeloRAT攻擊，誘騙企業員工執行遠端工具
article.summary: 資安業者 Rapid7近日揭露利用ModeloRAT惡意程式的活動，攻擊者透過微軟Teams平臺假冒IT支援人員進行社交工程，誘騙企業員工執行遠端管理工具，進而植入惡意程式並控制受害電腦。
article.title_zh: 透過微軟Teams散布惡意程式的攻擊又一樁！駭客假冒IT支援發動ModeloRAT攻擊，誘騙企業員工執行遠端工具
article.summary_zh: 資安業者 Rapid7近日揭露利用ModeloRAT惡意程式的活動，攻擊者透過微軟Teams平臺假冒IT支援人員進行社交工程，誘騙企業員工執行遠端管理工具，進而植入惡意程式並控制受害電腦。

article.title: With Google’s debut, the most important AI agent feature is now the most boring one
article.summary: When Google announced last week at its I/O conference that it was repositioning Antigravity as a platform for developing and managing teams of autonomous AI agents , the pitch quickly took on a familiar arc. For anyone paying attention to the space for the previous two months, the following felt a bit like déjà vu: One API call to the Antigravity agent spins up a remote Linux sandbox where the agent reasons, calls tools, runs code, and browses the web. You extend it by writing an AGENTS.md file and a SKILL.md file, register it as a named agent, and write no orchestration code. I have watched this product ship twice already in the last two months, from two other vendors, and this trend says everything about how important managed agent runtime has become — it has become s
article.title_zh: 隨著 Google 的推出，最重要的 AI agent 功能現已成為最無聊的功能
article.summary_zh: Google 在上週的 I/O 大會上宣佈將 Antigravity 重新定位為開發和管理自主 AI agents 團隊的平台，該宣傳迅速走上了一條熟悉的軌道。

article.title: Google on why it redesigned the Gmail and Workspace icons
article.summary: While the new Google Workspace icons appeared throughout I/O 2026, Google did not discuss them during the keynote. The company has since provided more details about the redesign. more…
article.title_zh: Google 說明重新設計 Gmail 和 Workspace 圖示的原因
article.summary_zh: 雖然新 Google Workspace 圖示在 I/O 2026 期間出現，但 Google 在主題演講中未提及。該公司現已提供更多重新設計的詳細資訊。

article.title: Google wants you to know that its AI Ultra plan is different from its AI Ultra plan
article.summary: TL;DR Google is making its AI Ultra plans slightly less confusing. The company is now clearly highlighting the differences between the two AI Ultra plans. The cheaper subscription offers five times higher AI usage compared to the Pro plan, and the more expensive plan offers 20 times higher AI usage. Google announced a cheaper version of its AI Ultra plan at I/O 2026, but in introducing the new offering, the company made things a little confusing for subscribers. Instead of giving the cheaper AI Ultra plan a new name to distinguish it from the more expensive version, Google’s plan selection UI started showing two identical “AI Ultra” plans with a huge price difference between them. Naturally, it wasn’t easy for users to figure out what each plan offers and how they differ. Don’t want to mis
article.title_zh: Google 希望你知道它的 AI Ultra 計劃與它的 AI Ultra 計劃不同
article.summary_zh: Google 正澄清兩個 AI Ultra 訂閱計劃的區別，較便宜的計劃相比 Pro 方案提供 5 倍更高的 AI 使用量。

article.title: Google Health Premium joins AI Pro as weekly email redesigned
article.summary: Besides the new mobile app fully rolling out today, Google Health is joining the Google AI Pro subscription. more…
article.title_zh: Google Health Premium 加入 AI Pro，每週電郵重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google Health 加入 Google AI Pro 訂閱服務，新的行動應用也在全面推出。

article.title: SpaceX admits it can't find enough chips for orbital AI yet, requires 'significantly more than are currently available to us' — firm's risk factors in IPO paperwork also says ambitious TeraFab project may not be successful
article.summary: SpaceX warns that it may not secure enough AI hardware to achieve its orbital AI ambitions even with supply from TeraFab. Also, Intel and Tesla may leave the TeraFab project.
article.title_zh: SpaceX承認無法為軌道AI找到足夠芯片，需要「遠超目前可用數量」——公司IPO文件中的風險因素還表示雄心勃勃的TeraFab項目可能不會成功
article.summary_zh: SpaceX警告即使從TeraFab獲得供應，也可能無法獲得足夠的AI硬件來實現軌道AI野心；Intel和Tesla也可能退出TeraFab項目。
